creator: vs@FreeBSD.org
text:
Dear Alex,
INSTALL_PROGRAM has the "strip" option set, but a stripped a shared  
library is not very useful...graphics/comical seems to use it, but I  
can't figure out what exactly it's using. Can you please explain why  
the library is stripped?

Volker
-- 
"In Macao ist alles besser!"
http://lambda.foldr.org/~vs/
